ddls:
CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "chair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chairperson of the committee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the committee's activities */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the committee's activities */,
  "committee_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the committee's purpose and objectives */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the committee (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the committee was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the committee was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the committee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the committee that set the goal */,
  "goal_description" TEXT /* Description of the goal */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the goal completion */,
  "goal_status" TEXT /* Current status of the goal (e.g., Draft, Approved, Completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the goal was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the goal was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the goal this milestone belongs to */,
  "milestone_description" TEXT /* Description of the milestone */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the milestone */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* Dependencies related to the milestone */,
  "milestone_status" TEXT /* Current status of the milestone (e.g., Not Started, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the milestone was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the milestone was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_milestones_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES goals ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deliverables" (
  "deliverable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deliverable */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the goal this deliverable is associated with */,
  "deliverable_description" TEXT /* Description of the deliverable */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the deliverable */,
  "deliverable_status" TEXT /* Current status of the deliverable (e.g., Not Started, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the deliverable document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the deliverable was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the deliverable was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deliverable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliverables_goal_id FOREIGN KEY ("goal_id") REFERENCES goals ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the committee that held the meeting */,
  "meeting_date" TEXT /* Date the meeting took place */,
  "agenda" TEXT /* Agenda for the meeting */,
  "minutes" TEXT /* Minutes of the meeting */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the meeting is held */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the meeting */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the meeting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the meeting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the meeting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to notify */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., meeting, milestone, deliverable) */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., Sent, Unsent) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Detailed message of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Chair, Staff) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the milestone that has dependencies */,
  "dependency_description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency */,
  "dependency_status" TEXT /* Status of the dependency (e.g., Not Started, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dependency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dependency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress report */,
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the goal this report is associated with */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report submission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the goal (e.g., on track, delayed) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the progress */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the meeting this attachment is associated with */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the attachment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attachment */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the attachment file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attachment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attachment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committee_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the committee this metric is associated with */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., Goals Achieved) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was reported */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., Quantitative, Qualitative) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committee_metrics_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_logs" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the committee this event is associated with */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., meeting, goal review) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the event log */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)
